mapper.select: /** 팝업게시판 토탈카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_banner WHERE 1=1
/** 통합게시판 상세 조회 */ SELECT * FROM t_banner WHERE IDX=#{idx}
mapper.insert: /** 팝업 등록 */ INSERT INTO t_banner (TITLE,STATUS,START_DTIME,END_DTIME,REG_ID,REG_NM,REG_DT,URL,SORT) VALUES (#{title},#{status},#{startDtime},#{endDtime},#{regId},#{regNm},#{addNowDt},#{url},#{sort})
mapper.select: SELECT TITLE,FILE_IMG_RENM,URL FROM t_banner WHERE STATUS=1 AND #{nowDtime} BETWEEN START_DTIME AND END_DTIME ORDER BY SORT
